temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A bright, fiery explosion erupts from the side of a dark, metal truss bridge at night. Sparks and smoke billow outwards as the structure is violently shaken by the force of the blast. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a scene of intense conflict and destruction, setting a dangerous and chaotic tone for the events to follow.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, booming explosion sound effect is followed by the metallic groaning and shaking of the bridge.)
(00:02-00:05) A group of people, including a man with long hair and a woman with dark hair, run frantically across a dark, wooden-plank bridge. They are all in a state of panic, with expressions of fear and urgency on their faces as they flee from an unseen threat. (Storyline: This segment introduces the protagonists and establishes their immediate goal: to escape a dangerous situation. Their panicked state builds suspense.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The sounds of frantic footsteps on wood, panicked breathing, and a tense, orchestral score with heavy percussion.)
